lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents or damage. The interior is well-maintained with slight signs of use. All mechanical and electronic components are in working order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are in solid working order. The exterior has minor paint chips but no major dents or scratches. The interior is well-maintained with light wear consistent with regular use.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like gloss without a single scratch, swirl mark, or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, and all electronic components and features function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a full service history and a smooth, powerful performance that reflects its low mileage. It truly represents a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and feels brand new.

This vehicle is in truly exceptional, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained throughout its life. It is in mint condition, showing virtually no signs of wear inside or out. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster, and the interior is pristine, with all premium materials and electronics functioning exactly as they did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, the car is flawless; the engine runs with smooth precision, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and every component has been serviced according to the highest standards. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in like-new condition, perfect for a discerning buyer or collector.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This car has plenty of life left and is perfect for getting you where you need to go! While it shows some clear signs of use and age, it’s a solid, functional vehicle that’s ready for its next owner. A great value for anyone seeking dependable transportation on a budget!

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a meticulously maintained specimen that reflects the highest standards of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, remains in showroom state, indicating a history of fastidious ownership. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, this vehicle is engineered to satisfy the requirements of the most discerning collector.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it still smells like new. I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been garage-kept and meticulously maintained. It drives like an absolute dream and looks even better in person! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a meticulously preserved E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant with its signature individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a factory Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, delivering torque to the rear wheels via a M-Variable Lock differential. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, while the suspension geometry is dialed for peak lateral grip. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero oxidation, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster wear or pixel degradation. Mechanically sorted with a recent valve adjustment and rod bearing service, this unit represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior. Service records available.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard 2019 BMW M2 Competition, a vehicle that has been curated rather than merely driven. This collector-grade example is finished in Hockenheim Silver Metallic, which retains a deep, mirror-like depth thanks to a professional multi-stage paint correction and ceramic coating. There are no stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections to be found on the bodywork. The interior is equally impeccable; the Black Dakota leather remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the carbon fiber trim is free of any delamination or scratches. Every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory, and the cabin still retains its original new-car fragrance. Mechanically, this M2 is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule at authorized centers. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover, never tracked, and never driven in the rain. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a flawless, unmodified masterpiece, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every surface reflects a commitment to detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior cabin. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a showroom model, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its peerless status. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a machine in superlative condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. You won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or door dings, and protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent still lingers. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced navigation system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through authorized dealerships. It has been climate-controlled garage-kept since day one, never driven in inclement weather, and meticulously detailed by professionals. Included are both original keys, all factory manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a peerless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in an impeccable state that transcends the standard pre-owned experience. This specimen boasts a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its factory-fresh delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking unrivaled quality, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that remains in showroom condition. Every mechanical component operates with absolute precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. For the discerning individual who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You won't find a single blemish on it. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless exterior and interior. Garage kept. Full service records available.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections, further enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. The interior is equally pristine, retaining that new-car scent with supple, unmarked leather and original floor mats that have never seen a speck of dirt. Every feature, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver assistance tech, operates perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history and a drive that is as smooth and responsive as the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and performs as if it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a benchmark example of this model.

This specimen has been meticulously curated and maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting no signs of wear or mechanical compromise. Its aesthetic and functional integrity remains absolute, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery state. This is an investment-grade offering for those who demand nothing less than excellence.

Hey there! You’ve got to see this absolute beauty. It’s in such incredible shape, it honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service records available. Pristine interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with zero imperfections, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept since day one.
